channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Troopers arrest motorcyclist after fiery I-75 pursuit in Hillsborough County: FHP
item.description: Florida Highway Patrol (FHP) troopers arrested a motorcyclist early Sunday morning after a fiery pursuit on Interstate 75 in Hillsborough County, according to a news release.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Chill out this summer with the Nueva Cantina frozen menu and cool food offerings
item.description: A local Mexican street taquería is cooling down the summer heat with a dedicated seasonal drink and food menu running through August. Raul Medina of Nueva Cantina shared details about the custom themes that his scratch kitchen is bringing to guests.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] 3 rescued after mayday call as boat takes on water

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami on rape and trafficking charges
item.description: Influencer brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested Saturday in Miami after U.K. prosecutors said they brought further rape and sex trafficking charges against them.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Iran hits US allies as Israel warns missiles headed for Jordan could land on its territory
item.description: The United States launched airstrikes in Iran on Sunday as Iranian missiles fired toward Jordan risked widening the conflict into neighboring Israel.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Russia unleashes one of biggest ballistic missile attacks of the Ukraine war, Kyiv says
item.description: Russia has launched one of its largest ballistic missile attacks against Ukraine since launching its full-scale invasion more than four years ago.
